name: ZORAIDA
title: Swamp Hag

abilities.name: Crooked Deal
abilities.text: When an enemy model with a Stunned token targets this model with an attack action, the enemy's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Eyes in the Woods
abilities.text: During the start phase of turn 1, this model may give up to three other allies a Craven token to place them anywhere on the friendly table half.

abilities.name: Moth Witch
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model declares a non-Charge general action, it may drain a (soulstone) to have another ally declare the same action.

actions.name: Bumps and Boils
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Stunned token, look at the top two cards of either fate deck and place them back in any order. If this action received a raise, the target gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Moth Swarm
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Poisoned Fate
triggers.text: When resolving, the target must discard a card or this action deals +2 damage.

triggers.name: Hag's Gift
triggers.text: Target gains a Bog Spirit token.

actions.name: Off the Path
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Other ally only. Discard up to two cards. For each card discarded, draw a card and move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Retrace Steps
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model may declare a non-Charge general action.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Witch's Brew
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Target heals 2 gains a Bolstered token.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

extraction_notes: Witch's Brew costs_and_restrictions has minor grammatical issue in source: 'heals 2 gains a Bolstered token' (missing comma or 'and' between heal amount and gains)
